title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Nexus Select Trust

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Nexus Select Trust
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Nexus Select Trust in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nexus Select Trust:
Nexus Select Trust is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Select Trust!
